name: My Classmates Became Heroes in Another World, But I was Left Behind in Modern Japan
translation-context:
Title: クラスメイトは異世界で勇者になったけど、俺だけ現代日本に置き去りにされました. Translate as: My Classmates Became Heroes in Another World, But I Was Left Behind in Modern Japan.

Premise: A mysterious voice chooses the 25 students in a classroom as heroes to save another world, granting them supernatural powers called skills and status before summoning them away. The 26th student, a recent transfer named Iori Osamu, is left behind in modern Japan but still receives skills and status. The story follows the one person left in Japan with otherworldly powers.

Name guidance: 伊織修 = Iori Osamu. Use Iori as the given name and Osamu as the family name only if the story context makes that order clear; otherwise keep the Japanese order if the source emphasizes it. Translate 勇者 as Hero, スキル as skill, ステータス as status, 異世界 as another world/other world, and 現代日本 as modern Japan.

Tone/style: modern-Japan supernatural fantasy with isekai mechanics happening around the protagonist rather than to him. Keep school-life narration natural and grounded, and keep game-like mechanics such as skills/status readable and consistent.
